prompt: Create a landing page for a project management SaaS called TaskFlow with features, pricing, and testimonials
expected_behavior: Creates preview/src/pages/TaskFlowPage.tsx with Navbar, Hero, FeatureGrid, PricingTable, Testimonials, and Footer. Updates App.tsx to render the page. Launches preview server.
validation: File preview/src/pages/TaskFlowPage.tsx exists and exports a named component
App.tsx imports and renders the new page
Type imports use import type syntax

prompt: Build me a homepage with a hero section, 4 features in a 2-column grid, and a FAQ
expected_behavior: Creates a page with Hero, FeatureGrid (columns=2, 4 features), and FAQ sections. Includes Navbar and Footer as standard page frame.
validation: FeatureGrid has columns={2} and exactly 4 features
FAQ section has sensible default items
Page wrapped in fragment with proper section IDs

prompt: Change the hero title to 'Build Better Products' and add a new pricing tier called 'Team' at $49/month
expected_behavior: Edits the existing page file to update the Hero title prop and adds a new plan to the plans array without recreating the entire file.
validation: Hero title prop updated in place
New plan object added to plans array
No unrelated changes to the file
